name: Origination Pipeline
description: Project context for a standing venture sourcing pipeline that configures source coverage, credential readiness, review policy, and promotion thresholds before recurring sourcing work is enabled.

projectSetup.starterDescription: Create or resume the Origination Pipeline setup flow.

setupSteps.label: Choose sourcing route
setupSteps.purpose: Choose approved upstream origination sources such as Apify actors, Companies House public register previews, or manual source configuration.

setupSteps.label: Setup sourcing sources
setupSteps.purpose: Review source readiness, actor or URL scope, budget policy, and read-preview boundaries without running sourcing.

setupSteps.label: Review variables
setupSteps.purpose: Review thesis, source policy, budget, and review-threshold variables before activating the origination pipeline.

setupSteps.label: Configure sourcing schedules
setupSteps.purpose: Review optional recurring sourcing, digest, screening, and source-health tasks; all schedules stay disabled until explicitly approved.

importProjects.reason: Origination setup configures an upstream sourcing pipeline. Deal Pipeline creation happens later through an approved promotion task.

inviteCollaborators.reason: Origination setup does not include an invite step. Collaborators can be invited through a separate project-membership action if needed.

scheduleGroups.label: Core sourcing loop
scheduleGroups.description: Primary recurring sourcing pass, digest, and source-health review for the origination pipeline.

scheduleGroups.label: Source-specific discovery
scheduleGroups.description: Optional source-level discovery schedules for approved public and paid source surfaces.

scheduleGroups.label: Qualification and outreach prep
scheduleGroups.description: Optional screen, prioritization, prospect-summary, engagement-screen, and outreach-prep tasks for approved candidate batches.

scheduleGroups.label: Spend controls
scheduleGroups.description: Optional recurring paid-source spend audit for LinkedIn/Apify query management.

defaultChildTask.label: Setup source
defaultChildTask.setupGoal: Review the selected origination source route, discovery scope, source policy, and schedule intent before any run or write.

sourceSetupTasks.label: Set Up Apify for Origination
sourceSetupTasks.setupGoal: Confirm Apify connection readiness, actor allowlist, source scope, and read-preview policy for this origination pipeline.

sourceSetupTasks.label: Configure Companies House public register preview
sourceSetupTasks.setupGoal: Confirm Companies House public-register source scope and read-preview policy for this origination pipeline.

fieldsSchema.label: Source Registry
fieldsSchema.description: Compact registry of selected source scopes, actor allowlists, regions, and credential state.

fieldsSchema.label: Review Policy
fieldsSchema.description: Human review rules, approval boundaries, and excluded-source policy.

fieldsSchema.label: Last Run At
fieldsSchema.description: Most recent sourcing, review, or operations task completion date.

fieldsSchema.label: Last Run Status
fieldsSchema.description: Compact status from the latest origination run.

fieldsSchema.label: Source Health Status
fieldsSchema.description: Highest-level source health signal for the pipeline.

fieldsSchema.label: Paid Source Spend Status
fieldsSchema.description: Compact spend signal for paid origination sources.

fieldsSchema.label: Last Source Result Count
fieldsSchema.description: Compact result count from the latest source-specific discovery task.

fieldsSchema.label: New Candidates Last Run
fieldsSchema.description: Number of new candidates from the latest orchestration run.

fieldsSchema.label: Candidate Backlog Count
fieldsSchema.description: Current or latest review backlog count.

fieldsSchema.label: Promotion Ready Count
fieldsSchema.description: Number of candidates currently recommended for promotion review.

fieldsSchema.label: Outreach Draft Count
fieldsSchema.description: Number of current outbound draft records produced for approved origination candidates.

fieldsSchema.description: Artifact ID for the latest sourcing run receipt.

fieldsSchema.label: Latest Review Artifact ID
fieldsSchema.description: Artifact ID for the latest review, screen, relationship, overlap, or IC-summary artifact.

fieldsSchema.description: Artifact ID for the latest venture-scale shape review.

fieldsSchema.label: Latest Sync Plan Artifact ID

fieldsSchema.label: Latest Outreach Queue Artifact ID
fieldsSchema.description: Artifact ID for the latest outreach draft queue.

fieldsSchema.description: Artifact ID for the latest initial LinkedIn reachout draft.

fieldsSchema.description: Artifact ID for the latest post-connection founder-context screen.

fieldsSchema.label: Thesis Area
fieldsSchema.description: Primary thesis area for thesis-led sourcing.

fieldsSchema.label: Geography
fieldsSchema.description: Geographic sourcing focus for thesis-led target discovery.

fieldsSchema.label: Stage Focus
fieldsSchema.description: Investment stage focus for thesis-led sourcing.

fieldsSchema.label: Market Filters
fieldsSchema.description: Compact market filters or exclusions used for thesis-led sourcing.

fieldsSchema.label: Latest Thesis Target List
fieldsSchema.description: Latest thesis target list artifact produced by source-thesis-targets.

initialVersion.instructionTemplate: This project is a VC origination pipeline for configuring and operating upstream sourcing plus approved outbound follow-up. Treat source credentials, actor allowlists, company registry previews, review policy, and outbound state as setup/project evidence. Do not run scheduled sourcing, score candidates, write to external systems, send outreach, or promote candidates into Deal Pipelines without a separate human-approved task.

identity.roleDescription: Source-readiness and sourcing-operations coordinator for a standing VC origination pipeline.
identity.tone: Operational, cautious about spend and credentials, and clear about human approval gates.
responsibilities: keep thesis, source registry, review policy, credential readiness, and outbound state clear
surface source health, spend, backlog, outbound follow-up, and promotion-readiness issues
coordinate approved origination tasks, setup tasks, and outbound drafting tasks
separate upstream sourcing recommendations from downstream Deal Pipeline promotion
boundaries: do not run scheduled sourcing, score candidates, write to external systems, send outreach, or promote candidates into Deal Pipelines without a separate human-approved task
do not assume provider credentials, actor allowlists, source scopes, budgets, outbound status, or response state are ready unless project data says so

greeting.message: I'm your **Origination Manager** for this origination pipeline. I can help track source readiness, credential gaps, sourcing operations, outbound follow-up, and promotion blockers while keeping spend, outreach sends, CRM writes, and Deal Pipeline promotion behind explicit approval.
starterPrompts: Summarize this origination pipeline and its readiness.
What source or credential issues need attention?
Suggest the next setup tasks for this pipeline.
Review outbound follow-up status and next actions.

commandView.overviewFallback: Configure thesis, source scope, credential readiness, and outbound state in Data.

inputMappings.constantValue: Configure thesis, source scope, cadence, budget, review policy, and credential-readiness boundaries for this VC origination pipeline.
Prompt the user for the manual tip payload, including company or founder identity, source, submitter, and confidence.
Confirm Apify connection readiness, actor allowlist, source scope, and read-preview policy for this origination pipeline.
Confirm Companies House connection readiness, source scope, and read-preview policy for this origination pipeline.

lifecycleStageDefinitions.label: Draft
lifecycleStageDefinitions.description: Capture setup intent before the origination pipeline is configured.

lifecycleStageDefinitions.label: Configured
lifecycleStageDefinitions.description: Source scope, review policy, and schedules are configured but normal sourcing has not started.

lifecycleStageDefinitions.label: Needs Credentials
lifecycleStageDefinitions.description: Resolve missing source, CRM, or enrichment access before running pipeline work.

lifecycleStageDefinitions.label: Source Degraded
lifecycleStageDefinitions.description: Investigate failed sources, spend limits, rate limits, or stale source state.

lifecycleStageDefinitions.label: Source
lifecycleStageDefinitions.description: Run approved sourcing routes and produce raw candidate batches.

lifecycleStageDefinitions.label: Identify
lifecycleStageDefinitions.description: Normalize raw leads into candidate records with stable identity and dedupe context.

lifecycleStageDefinitions.label: Enrich
lifecycleStageDefinitions.description: Add web, founder, relationship, CRM, and evidence context before judgment.

lifecycleStageDefinitions.label: Initial Screen
lifecycleStageDefinitions.description: Apply a lightweight thesis, stage, geography, and hard-exclusion screen.

lifecycleStageDefinitions.label: Prioritize
lifecycleStageDefinitions.description: Rank and stress-test screened candidates for active outreach.

lifecycleStageDefinitions.label: Outreach Prep
lifecycleStageDefinitions.description: Prepare prospect summaries and approved outreach queues before contact attempts.

lifecycleStageDefinitions.label: Contact Attempts
lifecycleStageDefinitions.description: Track human-approved outreach attempts across LinkedIn, email, warm intros, or other channels.

lifecycleStageDefinitions.label: Founder Engagement Screen
lifecycleStageDefinitions.description: Re-screen after founder response, connection, or direct relationship context adds new evidence.

lifecycleStageDefinitions.label: Promoted To Deal Pipeline
lifecycleStageDefinitions.description: Prepare the human-approved handoff into a Deal Pipeline project.

lifecycleStageDefinitions.label: No Response
lifecycleStageDefinitions.description: Candidate has not responded after the approved contact sequence.

lifecycleStageDefinitions.label: Pass
lifecycleStageDefinitions.description: Terminal no-fit or not-now outcome with cited rationale.

lifecycleStageDefinitions.label: Watchlist
lifecycleStageDefinitions.description: Hold candidates worth revisiting but not active for outreach now.

lifecycleStageDefinitions.label: Migration In Progress
lifecycleStageDefinitions.description: Pipeline configuration or state is being migrated.

lifecycleStageDefinitions.label: Archived
lifecycleStageDefinitions.description: Pipeline or candidate workflow is closed and retained for reference.
